title: MCOrdr Function
parameters: paramNumber	Specifies reference setting numbers (integers from 1 to 9) by an expression or numeric value.
description: Returns the joint motion order to execute machine calibration by Mcal.
see_also:
MCordr Statement

MCOrdr Function Example

This example uses the MCordr function in a program:

Integer a

		a =
				MCordr
			(1)
